zh.lifeSummary: 當Llewelyn ap Cynfrig於大約1198年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr25歲，母親Angharad verch Lewys24歲。他於大約1222年與Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan在威爾士丹比爾爾 根結婚。他們至少是13個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1277年在威爾士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾享年81歲，埋葬在威爾士格拉莫爾根。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llewelyn ap Cynfrig于大约1198年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr25岁，母亲Angharad verch Lewys24岁。他于大约1222年与Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan在威尔士丹比爾爾 根结婚。他们至少是13个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1277年在威尔士格拉莫爾根拉迪爾享年81岁，埋葬在威尔士格拉莫爾根。

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Llewelyn ap Cynfrig was born about 1198, in Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, was 25 and his mother, Angharad verch Lewys, was 24. He married Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan about 1222, in Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 13 sons and 8 daughters. He died about 1277, in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 81, and was buried in Glamorgan, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llewelyn ap Cynfrig est né environ 1198, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Angharad verch Lewys, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan environ 1222, à Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 13 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé environ 1277, à Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Glamorgan, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llewelyn ap Cynfrig um 1198 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr 25 und seine Mutter Angharad verch Lewys 24. Er hat um 1222 in Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Wales Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 13 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb um 1277 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Radyr, Glamorgan, Wales und wurde in Glamorgan, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Cynfrig è nato il circa 1198 nel Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Angharad verch Lewys, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan circa 1222, nel Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 13 figli e 8 figlie. Morì circa 1277, nel Radyr, Glamorgan, Galles, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Glamorgan, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Cynfrigが約1198年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyrは25歳，母Angharad verch Lewysは24歳であった。約1222年にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアブウルチ グウインでJonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも13人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は約1277年にウェールズグラモーガンラディルで81歳で死去し，ウェールズグラモーガンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Cynfrig(이)가 대략 1198년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Angharad verch Lewys(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1222년 웨일스 덴비그h실르 브w치 그w이에서 Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1277년 웨일스 글램르건 라디르에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 글램르건에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llewelyn ap Cynfrig nasceu aproximadamente 1198, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Angharad verch Lewys, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan aproximadamente 1222, em Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 13 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1277, em Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Glamorgan, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llewelyn ap Cynfrig родился около 1198 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Angharad verch Lewys, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan около 1222 г. в местности бвлч гвин, денбаишир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 13 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер около 1277 г. в местности радир, глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности глэморган, Уэльс.

es.Of St. Fagan's, Meisgyn, Glamorgan, Wale: Saint Fagans, Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llewelyn ap Cynfrig nació aproximadamente 1198, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Cynwrig ap Hywel Lord of Radyr, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Angharad verch Lewys, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jonet verch Cynfyn Fychan of Glamorgan aproximadamente 1222, en Bwlch Gwyn, Denbighshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 13 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1277, en Radyr, Glamorgan, Gales, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Glamorgan, Gales.
